description: thecattoolkit hooks: file protection, security checks, and type-checking

hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/protect-files.py; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/protect-files.py; else echo "Skipping hook: python not found" && exit 0; fi'

sh -c 'if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/security-check.py; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/security-check.py; else echo "Skipping hook: python not found" && exit 0; fi'

sh -c 'if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/type-check-on-edit.py; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/type-check-on-edit.py; else echo "Skipping hook: python not found" && exit 0; fi'
